name: Panther
description:
A very annoyed-looking feline. Not always angry.

This character's theme song:

< Fishcracks - Lights Out >

Guess what? Blackout, who could've POSSIBLY expected that, this had TOTALLY never hap-

Anyways, you were wondering around, the blackout already had lasted for a while and soon probably would end, just walking around and passing through the storage unit untill you are met with a sight of a Panther who was going to sneakily attack you. Now if you make the wrong move - you're dead. Good luck.

(Just gave her a little update)

I'm back, I guess. Here's the angry cat.

There is a way to tame her, or at least get her to not attack you, not gonna tell. It's easy tho.

Not been feeling like doing anything recently.
